## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] dbt models updated and `make dbt-parse` passes if SQL changed
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour or setup changed
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, keyfiles, etc.)
